Ntc And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And For Leave To Defend Action
Off Calendar Mar-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DYLAN ARRANTS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND FOR LEAVE TO DEFEND ACTION.
APPEARANCES: VERONICA GARCIA, ESQUIRE (LYNCH GILARDI & GRUMMER, 415.397.2800) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. TED W. BLOYD, ESQUIRE (LAW OFFICES OF EDWARD I. BLUM, 510.452.4400) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED ON THE CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT PAY $750 IN FEES AND COSTS WITHIN THIRTY DAYS TO PLAINTIFF. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Veronica Garcia, Esq. for Plaintiff: I. Cannan Electric.
Plaintiff's Witness: Leslie E. Kannan, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Dylan Arrants ind. and dba Dylan Arrants Construction as follows:
Damages $21,105.30
Prejudgment Interest $3,230.69
Costs for memo of cost, for a total of $24,335.99
Judgment signed in open court.
